name: Full-Stack Feature Development
description: Complete workflow for building a new production feature from architecture through deployment. Mirrors the agent-tools workflow-feature-dev.json but uses RealAI's richer agent fleet.

steps.task: Design the system architecture for the new feature. Produce an ADR covering data model, API contract, dependency graph, and scalability considerations.
Review the architectural design for security risks. Identify authentication requirements, data sensitivity, attack surface, and recommended mitigations.
Implement the feature based on the approved architecture. Write clean, well-tested Python code with type hints and docstrings. Follow the existing code style.
Create a comprehensive test suite covering unit tests, integration tests, and edge cases for the new feature. Achieve at least 90% line coverage.
Set up the CI/CD pipeline for the new feature. Configure staging deployment, smoke tests, rollback triggers, and production promotion gates.
